title: Classroom Routines and Group Skills
description: Skills related to participating in classroom routines, transitioning between activities, and sitting in group settings.

title: Group 7-M
description: Transitions between classroom activities with no more than 1 gestural or verbal prompt.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he transitions between classroom activities with only 1 gestural and/or 1 verbal prompt and no negative behavior. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he transitions between classroom activities, but requires 2 or more prompts of any type (except physical).

title: Group 8-M
description: Sits in a small group for 5 minutes without disruptive behavior or attempting to leave the group. (O)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he sits in a circle group of 3 or more children for 5 minutes without disruptive behavior or attempting to leave the group. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he sits in a circle group of 3 or more children for 2 minutes without disruptive behavior or attempting to leave the group.

title: Group 9-M
description: Sits in a small group for 10 minutes, attends to the teacher or material for 50% of the period, and responds to 5 of a teacher's SDs. (O)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he sits in a group activity (e.g., circle, arts and crafts, stations) with 3 or more children for 10 minutes and attends to the teacher or presented material for 50% of the period (using a time sample recording system), and responds to 5 teacher questions or instructions. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he sits in a group activity (e.g., circle, arts and crafts, stations) with 3 or more children for 10 minutes and attends to the teacher or presented material for 33% of the period, and responds to 2 teacher questions or instructions.

title: Linguistic Structure
description: Skills assessing articulation, growing listener/speaker vocabulary, multi-word utterances, and functional prosody.

title: Linguistics 6-M
description: The child's articulation of 10 tacts can be understood by familiar adults who cannot see the item tacted. (T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if familiar adults who cannot see the item tacted can understand his articulation of 10 tacts. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if familiar adults who cannot see the item tacted can understand his articulation of 5 tacts.

title: Linguistics 7-M
description: Has a total listener vocabulary of 100 words.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he has a total listener vocabulary of 100 words. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he has a total listener vocabulary of 50 words.

title: Linguistics 8-M
description: Emits 10 different 2-word utterances per day of any type except echoic (e.g., mand, tact). (O)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he emits 10 different 2-word utterances per day of any type except echoic (e.g., mand, tact). These responses can include verbal prompts to respond such as, 'What is that?' or 'What do you want?' 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he emits 5 different 2-word utterances per day of any type except echoic (e.g., mand, tact).

title: Linguistics 9-M
description: Emits functional prosody (i.e., rhythm, stress, intonation) on 5 occasions in one day (e.g., puts emphasis or stress on certain words such as It's MINE!). (O)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he emits functional prosody (i.e., rhythm, stress, intonation) on 5 occasions in one day. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he emits functional prosody (i.e., rhythm, stress, intonation) on 2 occasions in one day.

title: Linguistics 10-M
description: Has a total speaker vocabulary of 300 words (all verbal operants, except echoic). (E)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he has a total speaker vocabulary size of 300 words. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he has a total speaker vocabulary size of 200 words.
